---
name: Security note
about: Read this before reporting a security issue
title: "[Security] "
labels: security
assignees: ""
---

Please do not publish credentials, tokens, broker account details, or exploit
instructions in a public issue.

If the issue involves secrets, account access, order placement, authentication,
or a vulnerability that could harm users, contact the maintainers through a
private channel first. See `SECURITY.md`.
